properties.name: 4th Motor Rifle Brigade
properties.description:
204th Reserve Regiment joined before June 2023

Ex LPR unit and 2nd Army Corps Luhansk, now subordinate to 3rd Combined Arms Army

Has "Shustroy" group of the "AKHMAT" special forces as 2nd Motorized Battalion

Has Orki Lauda drones and Rusich 13th SRO with it as of 2025. Rusich left for 1194th Motor Rifle Regiment in later 2025, and 1194th Motor Rifle Regiment joined 4th Motor Rifle Brigade

1465th Motor Rifle Regiment joined in 2025

As of 2026, consists of: 
95th Rifle Regiment
96th Rifle Regiment
1219th Motor Rifle Regiment
373th Motor Rifle Battalion
276th Rifle Battalion

Was 3rd Separate Guards Motorized Rifle Order of the Republic Brigade , 3rd Guards Gorlovsky Detachment, Tactical Group "Gorlovka" until January 2023 when changed to 132nd Brigade as DPR formations now part of Russian army

As of 2026, consists of: 

101st Rifle Regiment
109th Rifle Regiment
20th Motor Rifle Regiment
1436th Motor Rifle Regiment
3 Motor Rifle Battalions
"Evil" Artillery Group

properties.name: [PMC] Wagner Group
properties.description: Was claimed to be 50,000 strong in December. Strength as of May 2023 estimate 20,000. Likely substantially lower after Coup attempt, and seemingly mostly defanged after Prigozhin assassinated
properties.Last Location: Disbanded and survivors sent to Rosgvardia/other units by September 2023
properties.Older Geolocations:
Throughout August 2022 onwards until June 2023 - Bakhmut Area for main concentration of convict units, smaller units elsewhere. 

Withdrawn after capture of Bakhmut in May 2023

Coup in Rostov on 23rd to 24th June 2023

Moved to Belarus June 2023

properties.name: [VOL] 7th St George Recon and Assault Brigade
properties.description:
https://thelookoutn.substack.com/p/new-russian-formations-update-004 was a battalion in early 2023

Since at least May 2023, all non MoD affiliated units of the Union of the Donbass Volunteers are regroupedin the "Separate consolidated Cossack battalion Georgievsky" (OSKB GEORGIEVSKIY)

In April 2023, on the basis of two detachments of the Union of Donbass Volunteers (SDV) “Kherson” (now “Bastion”) and “Whirlwind”, they formed the 7th Assault St. George Brigade. A little later, a third detachment appeared in it - “Baikal” and the artillery division “South”

Likely barely a few hundred men - Kodiak, 2025
